headline: Why an Iran deal might not be dovish for  the Fed
summary: Investing.com -- A potential U.S.-Iran peace deal may not deliver the interest rate relief that Treasury markets priced in Thursday, BofA Securities said in a recent note, warning that moderately higher oil prices could push the Federal Reserve toward hikes rather than cuts.

headline: CFTC weighs blocking CME’s 24/7 oil futures contract - Bloomberg
summary: Investing.com -- The U.S. Commodity Futures Trading Commission is considering whether to block CME Group’s proposal to launch a round-the-clock crude oil futures contract, according to a Bloomberg report citing a senior agency official familiar with the matter.
